answer: Welcome to AI Study Tracker! You can log your study sessions, track your focus, and get AI-driven insights on your productivity. Start by adding a session on the dashboard!
Your productivity score is calculated based on your average focus level and self-ratings across your study sessions. Aim for high focus (7+) to boost your score!
Exam readiness is a predictive metric that combines your total study hours, focus levels, and weekly consistency. It helps you understand if you're on track for your goals.
To add a study session, click 'Add New Session' on the Dashboard. Enter your subject, duration, and focus level to save it to your records.
Check out the 'Career Roadmap' page under AI Features! It suggests a roadmap based on your top subjects and helps you prepare for specific industry roles.
This AI Study Tracker was created to help students leverage machine learning for better academic performance.
